final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Write data to the cell
        end
        // If we is low, retain the current value
    end
endmodule
